prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: clue artifact detail. Story world: Ward 1908. Premise: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m.. Setting: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing. Threat presence: The Record Keeper. Recurring motifs: patient tags, flicker lights, stairwell echoes. Create shard card for holder ALLY_A. Content brief: Ally A receives names without index order.. Ensure it can stand alone but becomes decisive when combined with other shards.. Subgenre: haunted institution. Tone: SLOW_BURN. Immediate scene brief: Ward 1908 - Intake Ledger Concordance - ALLY_A Shard Card. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Show a physical evidence-board or clue collage with photographs, string, maps, stained paper, and marked surfaces. Prioritize tactile realism over readable text. Any writing should be minimal, blurred, or partially obscured.
